title: Pternandra paniculata
taxonomy: Pternandra paniculata is classified within the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the order Sapindales. This plant species falls under the family name that includes other plants such as the soapberry and the lychee. The classification also places Pternandra paniculata in the kingdom Plantae. The species is part of the genus Pternandra, which is native to Australia.
